name: query-aitm-relay
bodyMarkdown:
# AiTM WebSocket Relay Detection Query

**Category:** Detection Chokepoints | **Maturity:** Hunt | **FP Rate:** Low
**Techniques:** T1539, T1078.004 | **Log Sources:** Entra ID SigninLogs

```kql
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ResultType == 0
| where UserAgent has_any ("node", "axios", "undici", "node-fetch")
| where AppDisplayName has_any ("OfficeHome", "Microsoft Authentication Broker", "Microsoft Graph", "Microsoft Exchange Online")
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, AppDisplayName, UserAgent, IPAddress, ResultType
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
```
